creator: Eamon.Roque@arf.fak12.uni-muenchen.de
text:
Hi,

unfortunately, I'm still unable to boot the amd64 cds. x86 Snapshots
will boot, but the installed systems panic randomly
(6.2-Stable-7.0-Current).

Happily, newer 7.0-Current installations will boot with ACPI enabled,
but the random panics still take place.

HTH
